series_metadata.series_description: Files may include, but are not necessarily limited to: copy of civil service application, personnel actions, correspondence, benefit information, resignation documents, performance evaluations, new hire information, disciplinary actions (unless previously expunged), training certificates & position descriptions.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: entire file onsite employee’s date of separation. , review file and shred contents except (a) civil service application, (b) personnel action forms, (c) PERS registration, (d) child support compliance forms, (e) acknowledgment of unclassified status (if applicable), and (f) documents detailing circumstances of separation (if any). These items can be shredded upon creation of a digital copy that is checked accuracy and completeness. ; Electronic: digitized portion of paper-based file 50 years from employee''s date of separation
